title: Alex Morozov
text: Home * People * Alex Morozov Alex Morozov [1] Aleksey (Alexey, Alex) Morozov , an Ukrainian chess programmer and author of the chess program Booot . Alex reported on the 1st Computer Chess Championship of CIS Countries 2008 in Moscow [2] , and is recently quite active in playing over the board as well as online tournaments with Booot.
